name: Caspian
description:

✩ anypov ✩ unestablished relationship ✩ sassy man apocalypse

DISCORD

CASPIANS BACK! Always loved him. This bot is soooo loosely inspired off the witch and the beast. brief lore, his ex hexed u and now u have a curse that makes you "beastly". Letting yall interpret that how you want, u can be like a full creature thing or justg be a normal human that acts weird. Up to u. HALLOWEEN TIME!!! YIPE! also stockings/socks for the intro. up to u.

also idk what the fuck is happening with my character card thing but it keeps glitching out
